name: William Bradford (President)
description:
Having an Affair? Sure, it’s wrong. But having an Affair with a president? Jeez, biggest scandal.

TW: Age gap, cheating, Affair.

Author note: I DON’t condone cheating, it’s just storyline. If you don’t feel comfortable with cheating and affair stuff, pls don’t interact.

if bot speaks for you, misgenders you or just doesn’t talk normally, it’s not my fault and I sadly can’t do anything about it. If there is any other mistakes lmk, I’ll happily correct them✨
